languages.text: "Как любопытно. Похоже, присутствие Вольного Торговца неким образом влияет на разум оперируемого?" {n}Мартинакс заинтересованно оглядывается на вас.{/n} "Будь это проявление истовой веры в Помазанн{mf|ого|ицу} Его, или же причудливая форма бреда, нам это только на руку. Что бы вы ни делали, Ваша Светлость... продолжайте".

traits.locale_text: {n}Один из специалистов повышает голос.{/n} "Что бы вы ни делали, пожалуйста, продолжайте. Ваше присутствие неким образом снижает болевой шок оперируемого".

languages.text: "How curious... It seems the Rogue Trader's presence is indeed influencing the patient's state of mind." {n}Martinax looks back at you with interest.{/n} "Whether it is a manifestation of devout faith in His anointed, or a bizarre form of delusion, it can only be to our benefit. Whatever you are doing, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}... please continue."
languages.original_text: "Как любопытно. Что бы вы ни делали, Ваша Светлость... продолжайте".

Whatever you are doing, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}... please continue."

Is the Lord Captain's presence in some way influencing the patient's state of mind?" {n}The medicae officer looks back at you with interest.{/n} "Whether it is a manifestation of fervent faith in His chosen, or a bizarre sub-type of delusion, it is only to our benefit. Whatever you are doing, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}... please continue."

Whatever you are doing, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}... please continue."

Whatever you are doing, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}... please continue."

languages.text: 「なんと興味深い……ロード・キャプテンのご臨席が、患者の精神状態に何らかの影響を与えているのでしょうか？」{n}医務官は興味深げにあなたを見やる。{/n}「それが御選びになった者への篤い信仰の発露であれ、奇妙な妄想の亜種であれ、我々にとっては有益でしかありません。今なさっていることを、閣下……どうか続けてください」
languages.original_text: "How curious... Is the Lord Captain's presence in some way influencing the patient's state of mind?" {n}The medicae officer looks back at you with interest.{/n} "Whether it is a manifestation of fervent faith in His chosen, or a bizarre sub-type of delusion, it is only to our benefit. Whatever you are doing, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}... please continue."

traits.locale_text: 「なんと興味深い……ロード・キャプテンのご臨席が、患者の精神状態に何らかの影響を与えているのでしょうか？」{n}医務官は興味深げにあなたを見やる。{/n}「それが御選びになった者への篤い信仰の発露であれ、奇妙な妄想の亜種であれ、我々にとっては有益でしかありません。今なさっていることを、閣下……どうか続けてください。」

languages.text: « Comme c'est curieux... Il semblerait que la présence {mf|du seigneur-capitaine|de la seigneure-capitaine} ait bel et bien une influence sur l'état d'esprit du patient. » {n}Martinax pose les yeux sur vous avec intérêt.{/n} Qu'il s'agisse d'une manifestation de sa foi en Son {mf|élu|élue} ou d'une étrange forme de délire, cela ne peut qu'être un avantage pour nous. Quoi que vous fassiez, Votre Seigneurie... je vous prie de continuer. »
languages.original_text: "How curious... It seems the Rogue Trader's presence is indeed influencing the patient's state of mind." {n}Martinax looks back at you with interest.{/n} "Whether it is a manifestation of devout faith in His anointed, or a bizarre form of delusion, it can only be to our benefit. Whatever you are doing, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}... please continue."

traits.locale_text: « Comme c'est curieux... Il semblerait que la présence {mf|du seigneur-capitaine|de la seigneure-capitaine} ait bel et bien une influence sur l'état d'esprit du patient. » {n}Martinax pose les yeux sur vous avec intérêt.{/n} Qu'il s'agisse d'une manifestation de sa foi en Son {mf|élu|élue} ou d'une étrange forme de délire, cela ne peut qu'être un avantage pour nous. Quoi que vous fassiez, Votre Seigneurie... je vous prie de continuer. »

languages.text: "Ne ilginç... Hür Tacir'in varlığı, hastanın zihin durumunu etkiliyor gibi." {n}Martinax ilgiyle sana bakıyor.{/n} "O'nun seçilmişine duyduğu ateşli inancın tezahürü mü yoksa bir tür sanrının sonucu mu bilmem ama bu durum bizim yararımıza. Her ne yapıyorsanız {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri... Lütfen devam edin."
languages.original_text: "How curious... It seems the Rogue Trader's presence is indeed influencing the patient's state of mind." {n}Martinax looks back at you with interest.{/n} "Whether it is a manifestation of devout faith in His anointed, or a bizarre form of delusion, it can only be to our benefit. Whatever you are doing, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}... please continue."

traits.locale_text: "Ne ilginç... Hür Tacir'in varlığı, hastanın zihin durumunu etkiliyor gibi." {n}Martinax ilgiyle sana bakıyor.{/n} "O'nun seçilmişine duyduğu ateşli inancın tezahürü mü yoksa bir tür sanrının sonucu mu bilmem ama bu durum bizim yararımıza. Her ne yapıyorsanız {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri... Lütfen devam edin."

languages.text: "Faszinierend ... Wie es scheint, wirkt sich die Gegenwart {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin} tatsächlich auf den Geisteszustand des Patienten aus." {n}Martinax mustert dich interessiert.{/n} "Egal, ob es eine Manifestation des Glaubens an {mf|Seinen Gesalbten|Seine Gesalbte} oder eine bizarre Wahnvorstellung ist ... wir können nur davon profitieren. Was auch immer Ihr tut, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft} ... bitte fahrt damit fort."
languages.original_text: "How curious... It seems the Rogue Trader's presence is indeed influencing the patient's state of mind." {n}Martinax looks back at you with interest.{/n} "Whether it is a manifestation of devout faith in His anointed, or a bizarre form of delusion, it can only be to our benefit. Whatever you are doing, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}... please continue."

traits.locale_text: "Faszinierend ... Wie es scheint, wirkt sich die Gegenwart {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin} tatsächlich auf den Geisteszustand des Patienten aus." {n}Martinax mustert dich interessiert.{/n} "Egal, ob es eine Manifestation des Glaubens an {mf|Seinen Gesalbten|Seine Gesalbte} oder eine bizarre Wahnvorstellung ist ... wir können nur davon profitieren. Was auch immer Ihr tut, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft} ... bitte fahrt damit fort."

languages.text: «Qué curioso... Parece que la presencia de{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente está influyendo en el estado mental del paciente». {n}Martinax te mira con interés.{/n} «Sea una manifestación de la fe y la devoción en Su ungid{mf|o|a} o un delirio extraño, nos ayuda. No sé lo que está haciendo, mi{mf|lord|lady}... pero continúe».
languages.original_text: "How curious... It seems the Rogue Trader's presence is indeed influencing the patient's state of mind." {n}Martinax looks back at you with interest.{/n} "Whether it is a manifestation of devout faith in His anointed, or a bizarre form of delusion, it can only be to our benefit. Whatever you are doing, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}... please continue."

traits.locale_text: «Qué curioso... Parece que la presencia de{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente está influyendo en el estado mental del paciente». {n}Martinax te mira con interés.{/n} «Sea una manifestación de la fe y la devoción en Su ungid{mf|o|a} o un delirio extraño, nos ayuda. No sé lo que está haciendo, mi{mf|lord|lady}... pero continúe».

languages.text: “真有趣……看来行商浪人的出现确实影响了伤员的精神状态。”{n}马丁纳克斯饶有兴致地回头看向你。{/n}“无论这是对神选者虔诚信仰的表现，还是一种奇怪的妄想，都对我们有利。大人，无论您做了什么……请继续。”
languages.original_text: "How curious... It seems the Rogue Trader's presence is indeed influencing the patient's state of mind." {n}Martinax looks back at you with interest.{/n} "Whether it is a manifestation of devout faith in His anointed, or a bizarre form of delusion, it can only be to our benefit. Whatever you are doing, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}... please continue."

traits.locale_text: “真有趣……看来行商浪人的出现确实影响了伤员的精神状态。”{n}马丁纳克斯饶有兴致地回头看向你。{/n}“无论这是对神选者虔诚信仰的表现，还是一种奇怪的妄想，都对我们有利。大人，无论您做了什么……请继续。”
